The '''Adascopolis Financial Exchange''' was a financial service operated by [[the Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania]] during the time of the [[Old Sith Wars]].

==History==
An ancient financial service in the city of [[Adascopolis]], the capital of [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]], the Financial Exchange was run by [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|the Adasca BioMechanical Corporation]], a megacorp owned and operated by Arkania's very own [[House of Adasca]]. The Adasca family had a leading influence in the the [[Arkanian Dominion]] and continued in their dominance in the wake of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. It was at this time that many leading financial historians questioned the legitmacy of a government financial institution run by such a powerful political entity.<ref name="KOTOR16" />

{{Company-stub}}
